Issues: Excessive reliance on artificial lighting and neon effects makes the image feel highly staged and lacks gritty authenticity.
The depth of field/blurring effect (bokeh) is used heavily, but it overpowers the scene, causing the foreground and background details to lack consistent focus, which degrades print quality.
The scene is highly generic. While the mood is good, the lack of specific unique details or character storytelling makes it difficult to market for a premium price.
The crowd of blurred figures distracts from any potential central focus or product placement, making the composition busy rather than immersive.
Color saturation is extremely high, which can look overwhelming or cheap when printed, especially on standard materials.
